zh.Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fitzralph於1278年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Phillip James FitzRalph28歲，母親Inglebord de Meissner26歲。她於1298年與Ralph fitzSimon of Ormesby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Fitzralph于1278年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Phillip James FitzRalph28岁，母亲Inglebord de Meissner26岁。她于1298年与Ralph fitzSimon of Ormesby在英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾斯 奧姆斯比结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fitzralph was born in 1278, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Phillip James FitzRalph, was 28 and her mother, Inglebord de Meissner, was 26. She married Ralph fitzSimon of Ormesby in 1298, in North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fitzralph est née en 1278, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Phillip James FitzRalph, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Inglebord de Meissner, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph fitzSimon of Ormesby en 1298, à North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1298 in North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph fitzSimon of Ormesby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb in England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Ralph fitzSimon of Ormesby nel 1298, nel North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.North Ormsby, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース オルムスビー
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Fitzralphが1278年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Phillip James FitzRalphは28歳，母Inglebord de Meissnerは26歳であった。1298年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース オルムスビーでRalph fitzSimon of Ormesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fitzralph(이)가 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Phillip James FitzRalph(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Inglebord de Meissner(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 오스비에서 Ralph fitzSimon of Ormesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fitzralph родилась в 1278 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Phillip James FitzRalph было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Inglebord de Meissner, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph fitzSimon of Ormesby в 1298 г. в местности норт ормсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности Англия, Великобритания.
